Complementary Results

About

Description

Michelangelo di Lodovico Buonarroti Simoni, known mononymously as Michelangelo, was an Italian sculptor, painter, architect, and poet of the High Renaissance. He was born in the Republic of Florence but was mostly active in Rome from his 30s onwards. Wikipedia
Born: March 6, 1475, Caprese Michelangelo, Italy
Died: February 18, 1564 (age 88 years), Papal States
Influenced by: Leonardo da Vinci, Donatello, Lorenzo de' Medici · See more
Periods: Renaissance, Italian Renaissance, High Renaissance
Siblings: Giovan Simone Buonarroti Simoni · See more
Education: Università di Firenze
Full name: Michelangelo di Lodovico Buonarroti Simoni
